_comment: Merge this ONE entry into power.config.json → databaseReferences → 'default.cds' → dataSources. It sits alongside the existing md_appusers / coe_* entries. This registers the md_master table so the live MD View (V8) can query it via the Dataverse connector. Verify the entitySetName against your table's Session details / metadata; the loader also auto-resolves it at runtime.
